name: flight-route-status
description: Real-time flight status between two airports (IATA). Multi-source, cheapest-first: FlightAPI track-by-route, AviationStack live flights, GoFlightLabs live flights — all MPP-routed via the SELAT Router.

depIata.description: Departure airport IATA code, e.g. CGK (Jakarta), JFK, LHR.

arrIata.description: Arrival airport IATA code, e.g. PEK (Beijing), NRT, SIN.

limit.description: Max rows to return from AviationStack / GoFlightLabs list endpoints (string integer, e.g. 5).

steps.label: track-by-route — FlightAPI (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
live flights — AviationStack (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
live flights — GoFlightLabs (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
